nasb.text: Whether it be on the bed or on the thing on which she is sitting, when he touches it, he shall be unclean until evening.

esv.text: Whether it is the bed or anything on which she sits, when he touches it he shall be unclean until the evening.

cnv.text: 在女人的床上，或是在她坐過的家具上，如果有別的東西，人摸了它，就不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: 不论是她的床，还是她坐的东西，碰到的人都不洁净，要等到傍晚才能洁净。
